audit_items.proof_trace: The `eligibleAssetsIdx = 0` reset at L272 (triggered when `isAssetOutPriceValid == false`) ensures no new auctions start when the assetOut price is invalid, regardless of individual asset price validity; `performUpkeep` with empty `eligibleAssets` (L314/L324) skips the auction-start loop entirely. Time-expired ended auctions can still appear in `endedAuctions` (L250 time check is price-independent), but `_onAuctionEnd` only cleans up timed-out auctions and does not start new bids — this is intentional by design, not a vulnerability.
